title: Baler heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baler with a Z-Score of +5.23. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Baler is causing extreme temperatures, with a CDD of 17.3 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 38%, and the wind speed is 1.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
